programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason returns as Granville in this follow-up to Roy Clarkes popular comedy Open All Hours, as he re-opens the doors of the nations favourite corner shop. In the opening episode, Arkwrights protege finds an old mangle in the yard - and wonders how he can best put it to use. Meanwhile, Beth continues to pressure Leroy to find a date for her best friend, Ruby, who has been suspended at work. Elsewhere, Eric and Cyril tutor Mr Newbold in the art of romance - and how to get closer to Mrs Rossi. Co-starring James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Katie Redford

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: A squeak on Granvilles bike interferes with his hopes of romance, and Arkwright worries about a mysterious visitor to a house in Atkinson Terrace

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville decides a fashion makeover is needed to impress Stephanie from the local boutique, but Arkwrights meddling soon puts paid to any romantic dalliance. Roy Clarkes classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville buys too much stock and needs to come up with a way of getting rid of it all. Luckily, the visiting salesman gives him a cunning marketing idea. Meanwhile, Eric is not getting on with his wife, so he seeks emergency romantic advice from Leroy. Can the young Romeo help his hapless friend woo his missus again?

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville arranges a double date with Madge and Mavis for himself and Gastric - but has to smarten his friend up first. Mrs Featherstone has her eye on a potential new husband, Nurse Gladys is wooed by a man whose boil she once treated, while Eric and Cyril need to come up with some clever marketing ideas when a mysterious new product arrives in the shop

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville has some outdated Christmas puddings to sell, but needs a clever plan to lure his sceptical customers into buying them. Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom, but luckily Granville discovers Gastric has a hidden dark side with spiritual powers that could solve the mystery and impress Madge. Meanwhile, Mrs Hussein takes a shine to Leroy and wants to know what they keep behind the counter for special customers

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to stop Madge from moving away and taking Mavis with her - but there is only one person who can change their minds, and he has been dead for years. He also finds himself with a consignment of incredibly sour crab-apple jelly to get rid of. Mrs Featherstone makes Mr Newbold an offer he cannot refuse, and Eric and Cyril vow to be more careful with their money

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville starts making his own sausages using a second-hand machine. Gastric turns his Mini into a self-driving car, and Eric and Cyril take up rock climbing - but Kath insists they do their training at home. Mrs Featherstone decides to stir up some gossip in her pursuit of another husband, while Leroy tries to persuade Beth to break up with her boyfriend

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville creates a special blend of snuff, but will his customers notice any beneficial effects? The ladies get dressed up for line-dancing, while Gastric is prompted to go on a diet. A furtive Mr Newbold thinks hes found a pastime to share with Mrs Rossi - away from the prying eyes of Mrs Featherstone. However, a determined Black Widow enlists assistance from Granville and Leroy for a crash-course in how to ride a bicycle. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason returns as Granville in this follow-up to Roy Clarkes popular comedy Open All Hours, as he re-opens the doors of the nations favourite corner shop. In the opening episode, Arkwrights protege finds an old mangle in the yard - and wonders how he can best put it to use. Meanwhile, Beth continues to pressure Leroy to find a date for her best friend, Ruby, who has been suspended at work. Elsewhere, Eric and Cyril tutor Mr Newbold in the art of romance - and how to get closer to Mrs Rossi. Co-starring James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Katie Redford

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: A squeak on Granvilles bike interferes with his hopes of romance, and Arkwright worries about a mysterious visitor to a house in Atkinson Terrace

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville decides a fashion makeover is needed to impress Stephanie from the local boutique, but Arkwrights meddling soon puts paid to any romantic dalliance. Roy Clarkes classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville buys too much stock and needs to come up with a way of getting rid of it all. Luckily, the visiting salesman gives him a cunning marketing idea. Meanwhile, Eric is not getting on with his wife, so he seeks emergency romantic advice from Leroy. Can the young Romeo help his hapless friend woo his missus again?

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville arranges a double date with Madge and Mavis for himself and Gastric - but has to smarten his friend up first. Mrs Featherstone has her eye on a potential new husband, Nurse Gladys is wooed by a man whose boil she once treated, while Eric and Cyril need to come up with some clever marketing ideas when a mysterious new product arrives in the shop

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville has some outdated Christmas puddings to sell, but needs a clever plan to lure his sceptical customers into buying them. Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom, but luckily Granville discovers Gastric has a hidden dark side with spiritual powers that could solve the mystery and impress Madge. Meanwhile, Mrs Hussein takes a shine to Leroy and wants to know what they keep behind the counter for special customers

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Mavis goes to a wedding, but Gastric warns Granville of the danger of leaving her alone in a romantic setting. Eric, Cyril and Mr Newbold consider exploring their feminine side, while Mrs Featherstone is concerned that Mrs Rossi is becoming a bad influence on the shop, and Kath is on the receiving end of a new technique for matching customers to the perfect product

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys decides Arkwright needs a lesson in politeness, and convinces him a writer for the Good Shop Guide is doing the rounds. She then poses as the critic to see for herself the unusual sight of the miserly shopkeeper being nice to his customers. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to stop Madge from moving away and taking Mavis with her - but there is only one person who can change their minds, and he has been dead for years. Eric, Cyril and Mr Newbold consider exploring their feminine side, while Mrs Featherstone is concerned that Mrs Rossi is becoming a bad influence on the shop, and Kath is on the receiving end of a new technique for matching customers to the perfect product

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright loses his trousers on the way to the wedding of Nurse Gladys Emmanuels niece, and ends up having to borrow a pair of her trousers to wear at the event

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason returns as Granville in this follow-up to Roy Clarkes popular comedy Open All Hours, as he re-opens the doors of the nations favourite corner shop. In the opening episode, Arkwrights protege finds an old mangle in the yard - and wonders how he can best put it to use. Meanwhile, Beth continues to pressure Leroy to find a date for her best friend, Ruby, who has been suspended at work. Elsewhere, Eric and Cyril tutor Mr Newbold in the art of romance - and how to get closer to Mrs Rossi. Co-starring James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Katie Redford

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: A squeak on Granvilles bike interferes with his hopes of romance, and Arkwright worries about a mysterious visitor to a house in Atkinson Terrace

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville decides a fashion makeover is needed to impress Stephanie from the local boutique, but Arkwrights meddling soon puts paid to any romantic dalliance. Roy Clarkes classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma treats best friend Leanne to a shopping spree, during which she discovers Bolton Acting School and decides to join up. She also arranges another family meeting between Lin and Joan at an upmarket restaurant, but its not to everybodys taste. Comedy, starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: In a bid to make some much-needed money, Alison and Mike consider selling some land. The plan proves far from straight forward however, with Lady Button up in arms at the mere thought of losing some of her beloved estate. Thomas enters a competition that he hopes will finally see him become a published poet, but hearing Lady Button speak so passionately about Button House gives him an idea or two. Pat and Julian get locked in a dispute and it is Robin who offers a surprising pearl of wisdom. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the British sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarkes comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys Emmanuels washing-machine breaks down, and Arkwright decides to try and lure her into his home with the offer of his vintage machine

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy attends a three-day trade conference to drum up business, but when she has little luck she resorts to flirting with the male delegates. Lee is outraged with her plan, however, and in an attempt to stop her he turns up at the event - posing as her husband. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of how the British sitcom was made, featuring unseen footage of Victoria Wood, and interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: After a recent break-up, Alma tries to get her life back on track, but with no job, no qualifications and a rebellious streak a mile wide, it is not going to be easy. Meanwhile, her heroin-addicted mother has been sectioned for arson, and her grandmother Joan wants nothing to do with it. Comedy pilot, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: After the tragic death of his friend Axel Jacklin - Britains finest exponent of acting in high winds - Steven finds himself in demand for dramatic roles such as Napoleonic-era sea captains and mad Shakespearean kings. However, to land these attractive parts, he discovers he must become a Freemason, and asks Ed to help him join the local lodge

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: To celebrate her 40th wedding anniversary, Marlene wants to renew her marriage vows with Boycie, and tries to make contact with old friends while compiling the guest list - only to receive devastating news. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville has some outdated Christmas puddings to sell, but needs a clever plan to lure his sceptical customers into buying them. Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom, but luckily Granville discovers Gastric has a hidden dark side with spiritual powers that could solve the mystery and impress Madge. Meanwhile, Mrs Hussein takes a shine to Leroy and wants to know what they keep behind the counter for special customers

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright attends a former customers funeral, leaving Granville in charge of the store. However, the miserly shopkeeper has difficulty trusting his nephew to run it properly

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarkes comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys Emmanuels washing-machine breaks down, and Arkwright decides to try and lure her into his home with the offer of his vintage machine

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: An Errand Boy by the Ear
programme.desc: Arkwright decides Granville needs toughening up and starts dragging him around the store by his ear, but the regular customers are unhappy by what they see

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville places an ad in a lonely hearts magazine and finally meets the girl of his dreams. After stretching the truth about being a young executive with a flash sports car, his romance ends before it even begins. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville is determined to play Cupid for Madge and Gastric, but he realises he will stand no chance of matchmaking the pair unless the latter improves his image. His plans take an inspired turn, however, when a salesman returns to town. Wet Eric is desperate to convince his wife its going to rain and gets lured into a dangerous purchase, and Granville sets his sights on Old Bentinck, who never goes into the shop, coming up with a cunning way to tempt him in to spend. David Jason, Mark Williams, Tim Healy and Johnny Vegas star

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: The shopkeeping comedy returns with a festive instalment. Granville and Gastric find themselves playing marriage counsellors, while Leroy adopts a festive disguise to avoid relationship trouble of a different kind. Meanwhile, Mrs Featherstone struggles to get into the Christmas spirit and Kath attempts to bring the street together as one harmonious choir of carollers to beat Finkle Street once and for all - but does Granville have a trick up his sleeve to help them out? Starring David Jason, Tim Healy, James Baxter and Stephanie Cole

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville faces being left alone at Christmas as all his friends and neighbours make plans to go away. He is particularly dismayed to see Mavis planning a Christmas break with Madge, and terrified to learn that Mr Newbold is plotting an escape from Mrs Featherstones advances, and leaving Granville entirely at her mercy. To make matters worse, the wily shopkeeper has a consignment of dodgy Christmas crackers to sell and a distinct shortage of customers. David Jason stars in the special festive episode

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to sell bargain spectacles that do nothing for his customers eyesight, while Mr Newbold is inspired to take control of his life by a self-help book and resolves to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about her. Eric tries to persuade Kath to join him on a camping holiday, and Leroy receives a mysterious package

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Almas dream of becoming an actress isnt going to be easy and she needs to find a day job. After unsuccessfully dipping her toe into the world of escorting, she reluctantly takes up a position at a sandwich shop. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, his wife is preoccupied with plotting revenge on the ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice? Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy is always looking for ways of improving her position in the world and sees another chance by befriending posh new neighbours Toby and Anna. But she hasnt reckoned on Lee dragging her right back down to earth. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in the sitcom, with guest appearances from Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy becomes a relationship counsellor, so Lee and his father take advantage of her new-found skills in an effort to patch things up between them. Can they finally forgive and forget? Bobby Ball guest stars as Frank, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.desc: Granville decides a fashion makeover is needed to impress Stephanie from the local boutique, but Arkwrights meddling soon puts paid to any romantic dalliance. Roy Clarkes classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.desc: Alma treats best friend Leanne to a shopping spree, during which she discovers Bolton Acting School and decides to join up. She also arranges another family meeting between Lin and Joan at an upmarket restaurant, but its not to everybodys taste. Comedy, starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: In a bid to make some much-needed money, Alison and Mike consider selling some land. The plan proves far from straight forward however, with Lady Button up in arms at the mere thought of losing some of her beloved estate. Thomas enters a competition that he hopes will finally see him become a published poet, but hearing Lady Button speak so passionately about Button House gives him an idea or two. Pat and Julian get locked in a dispute and it is Robin who offers a surprising pearl of wisdom. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the British sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.desc: Part two of two. programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: In the first of a six-part story centring on two brothers, a man is badly beaten in a street fight outside the busy E1 bar. Smithy and Callum break up the skirmish and encounter bar owner Jason Devlin, who reveals a vicious streak and manages to rile the officers with his smug air of self-confidence. They entertain doubts about his innocence but are intrigued when he implicates his own brother in the disturbance - without acknowledging the relationship

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of six. The fire at the E1 bar reveals the fact that the Devlins had many enemies, and Smithy starts to take their arrogance personally. Investigators find cocaine and forged identity documents in the debris of the barmans flat, but he insists he knew nothing about either, even when Callum threatens to tell his boss he has been cheating on him with his girlfriend

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa goes into labour a month early in Barry, and the newlyweds must forget their differences to track down Smithy in time for the birth of his child. Meanwhile, Stacey returns to Essex to salvage her marriage

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Daves caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neils christening. programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren receives a proposal, and Bernies sisters make an appearance, while Derek Faye meets Bonnie Langford, guest starring as herself

programme.title: Death at the Mansion: Rebecca Zahau
programme.desc: Experts take a closer look at who Rebecca was as they try to figure out whether the crime scene was staged to look like a suicide

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Jools Holland and pop band the Divine Comedy guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Lauren fights with Kelly over Ryan, and 1950s landlady Ma Willow makes her first appearance

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren receives a proposal, and Bernies sisters make an appearance, while Derek Faye meets Bonnie Langford, guest starring as herself

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr join forces to renovate the last two rooms. Their dream of creating an open plan living and dining room is dented when they discover the main structural wall dividing the two spaces requires a much smaller arch than they anticipated. For this final space, they agree to put their design differences to one side, but a disagreement over the shape of the arch threatens to divide them. Away from the task, the duo take a boat trip along the stunning Zingaro nature reserve to get inspiration from the Sicilian landscape, and enjoy sunset on horseback in the ancient Greek city of Selinunte

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: With Ben away on a volunteer dental programme in the Colombian rainforest, Susan goes for a drink with an old flame, but although they part on good terms, she regrets agreeing to drop off a package for him. Zoe Wanamaker stars, with a guest appearance by Joe McGann (The Upper Hand)

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael and Janey treat their parents to a Spanish holiday for their anniversary, but the flight is a living hell as Ben picks fights with his fellow passengers - and then there is the little matter of the virus outbreak that forces them into quarantine at the airport on arrival. Back home, Michael admits he charged the all-expenses-paid trip to his dads credit card - now all he needs is a quick way of paying it back

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: After 11 series in as many years, the Harper family bids farewell in the last-ever episode. Susan and Janey are at a hen party, which is great fun until the bride announces her groom does not want her any more, while family friend Roger is excited about a blind date. The only one at home is Ben, who is babysitting Kenzo - although the grumpy dentist soon finds himself reluctantly going out too. Comedy, starring Robert Lindsay, Zoe Wanamaker, Daniela Denby-Ashe and Keiron Self

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Susan feels in need of love and attention, and hopes dragging a reluctant Ben along on a spiritual course for couples will put the spark back into their marriage. But when asked to describe why they love each other, they fail miserably - and that is just the first task. Back at home, Michael is devastated when he is dumped by new boyfriend Matt - then dealt a further blow when Janey remains friends with his ex. Comedy, starring Robert Lindsay, Zoe Wanamaker, Daniel Denby-Ashe and Gabriel Thomson

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: With Ben away at a conference for the week, Susan throws herself into her work - only to end up being accused of sexual harassment by a colleague. Kenzo becomes the target of a revenge campaign by Michaels former art teacher, who had a grudge against him when he was a pupil. Comedy, starring Zoe Wanamaker, Tayler Marshall and Gabriel Thomson

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Susan is asked to make a speech at a school reunion - but after a mix-up at work ends with her quitting her job, what should have been an uplifting talk descends into bitterness and contempt. Kenzo develops a playground crush, so Ben offers the benefit of his experience - much to Janeys horror

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats nine-month-old cockapoo Betsy, whose owners Sophie and Dan are concerned about a dragging front paw caused by nerve damage, to see if there are surgical options. But when Betsy develops gangrene, she has to have her paw amputated, and in order to salvage the rest of her limb, Noel must replace her amputated foot with a skeletally-anchored implant called a PerFiTS (Percutaneous Fixation to the Skeleton)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary featuring one of the most emotional and heart-rending stories ever filmed - that of Noel Fitzpatricks own dog, Keira. In September 2020, Noels life was turned upside down when the 13-year-old border terrier was hit by a car right outside the practice. Having sustained a ruptured abdominal lining and urinary bladder, a crushed sacrum and pelvis and a dislocated hip, Noels colleagues worked tirelessly to repair extensive internal damage. Suddenly, the surgeon renowned for finding solutions for even the most challenging injuries, had to steel himself for the most important surgery of his life

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats chocolate Labrador Inca, who has a history of developmental elbow disease and osteoarthritis that has led to her elbow joints becoming worn out. Two-year-old Cavapoo Nala, who has hip dysplasia, and Great Dane Charles, who is unsteady on his feet due to a squashed spinal cord, are also on the patients list. Charles owner Steve knows only too well that spinal surgery is a hugely serious undertaking, as he himself had multiple surgeries following a bike accident a decade earlier

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service treat a site foreman having a heart attack on a building site and a woman who has hit her head on sharp gardening shears

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford race to an 8-month-old baby who needs urgent help to breathe. In Portsmouth, a cancer patient thinks her chemotherapy drugs are causing her chest pain

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Teenager Nathan has two twisted teeth extracted, Bob has keyhole surgery for a groin hernia, and 96-year-old Peggy entertains the team while having a growth removed from her toe

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Jonathan has a camera put inside his lungs to find out if he has cancer. James needs a knee operation so he can play with his children again, and a growth is removed from Jans ear

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Leslie Phillips and Olympic curling champion Rhona Martin guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky characters. Among other highlights, Nan visits an old friend in hospital and Lauren takes a job in a burger bar

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Jools Holland and pop band the Divine Comedy guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Lauren fights with Kelly over Ryan, and 1950s landlady Ma Willow makes her first appearance

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: An active mum from a tight-knit pro wrestling family trades places with a mother-of-three whose husband prefers playing video games to spending time with his family

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A cosmopolitan, appearance-focused mum-of-three switches places with the mum from a down-to-earth farming family who has four children and hundreds of animals

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey challenges members of the Paine family to declutter their home in seven days. In order to do this, they have to let go of half their possessions so that they can then reorganise their property. There are emotional moments as single mother Steph and her three daughters go through their most treasured items, and make some difficult decisions about what to let go of from their past. The items they do decide to let go of will be put into piles to recycle, donate or sell. Plus, tidying and upcycling tips from carpenter Robert Bent, organiser Dilly Carter and cleaner Iwan Carrington

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Oscar-winning actress at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, her life away from acting and her relationship with her husband, the late Michael Williams. Louis also accompanies Judi to the Gielgud Theatre in Londons West End, where they discuss the difficulties of the lockdown and how it inadvertently led to her surprise popularity on TikTok

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats nine-month-old cockapoo Betsy, whose owners Sophie and Dan are concerned about a dragging front paw caused by nerve damage, to see if there are surgical options. But when Betsy develops gangrene, she has to have her paw amputated, and in order to salvage the rest of her limb, Noel must replace her amputated foot with a skeletally-anchored implant called a PerFiTS (Percutaneous Fixation to the Skeleton)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary featuring one of the most emotional and heart-rending stories ever filmed - that of Noel Fitzpatricks own dog, Keira. In September 2020, Noels life was turned upside down when the 13-year-old border terrier was hit by a car right outside the practice. Having sustained a ruptured abdominal lining and urinary bladder, a crushed sacrum and pelvis and a dislocated hip, Noels colleagues worked tirelessly to repair extensive internal damage. Suddenly, the surgeon renowned for finding solutions for even the most challenging injuries, had to steel himself for the most important surgery of his life

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats chocolate Labrador Inca, who has a history of developmental elbow disease and osteoarthritis that has led to her elbow joints becoming worn out. Two-year-old Cavapoo Nala, who has hip dysplasia, and Great Dane Charles, who is unsteady on his feet due to a squashed spinal cord, are also on the patients list. Charles owner Steve knows only too well that spinal surgery is a hugely serious undertaking, as he himself had multiple surgeries following a bike accident a decade earlier

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service treat a site foreman having a heart attack on a building site and a woman who has hit her head on sharp gardening shears

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford race to an 8-month-old baby who needs urgent help to breathe. In Portsmouth, a cancer patient thinks her chemotherapy drugs are causing her chest pain

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Teenager Nathan has two twisted teeth extracted, Bob has keyhole surgery for a groin hernia, and 96-year-old Peggy entertains the team while having a growth removed from her toe

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Jonathan has a camera put inside his lungs to find out if he has cancer. James needs a knee operation so he can play with his children again, and a growth is removed from Jans ear

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Leslie Phillips and Olympic curling champion Rhona Martin guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky characters. Among other highlights, Nan visits an old friend in hospital and Lauren takes a job in a burger bar

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Jools Holland and pop band the Divine Comedy guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Lauren fights with Kelly over Ryan, and 1950s landlady Ma Willow makes her first appearance

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren receives a proposal, and Bernies sisters make an appearance, while Derek Faye meets Bonnie Langford, guest starring as herself

programme.title: Death at the Mansion: Rebecca Zahau
programme.desc: Experts take a closer look at who Rebecca was as they try to figure out whether the crime scene was staged to look like a suicide

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey encourages members of the Patel family to tidy their immediate environment, as mum Bijal, dad Darshan and their two children move all their possessions into a warehouse, where they are encouraged to recycle, donate and sell items. There are emotional moments as the quartet go through their most treasured items. Bijal and Darshan struggle to part with their possessions, but really want to create an environment free of the chaos for their son, who finds it hard to concentrate in the clutter. As usual, home improvement gurus Dilly Carter, Iwan Carrington and Robert Bent offer tidying and upcycling tips

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Oscar-winning actress at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, her life away from acting and her relationship with her husband, the late Michael Williams. Louis also accompanies Judi to the Gielgud Theatre in Londons West End, where they discuss the difficulties of the lockdown and how it inadvertently led to her surprise popularity on TikTok

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The A4 LNER Pacific Locomotive, Sir Nigel Gresley, must be hauled 46 miles at 30mph from Crewe to Bridgnorth

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: British car enthusiasts Will and Gus reckon theres big profit to be made when they track down a 1980s Austin Metro. Its cheap, its clean and its bright yellow and they have high hopes to treble their money

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit a stately home in Somerset, where Simon is convinced he has uncovered a genuine Tudor relic

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Inexperienced skipper Chaz Bruce and his crew run into difficulty when a rope wraps around the boats propeller and the engine loses revs, but he is determined to prove himself. Meanwhile, disaster strikes for Jimmy Buchan, and captain Alan Watt heads for the North Atlantic

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Insight into the dangerous job of John Alexander, who works alone on his tiny boat, fishing in all weather for brown crabs. Elsewhere, Alan Watt returns from the North Atlantic with a lucrative haul of monkfish, but his journey is put in jeopardy when the main winch jams. On the New Dawn, Chaz Bruce endures a nightmare trip

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ventures deep into the Black Forest, where he discovers how Hansel and Gretel helped to unify the German nation. A masterclass in carving cuckoo clocks demonstrates how the nations reputation for quality and reliability in manufacturing was established. Later, at Goettingen University, the former politician discovers two sides of student life at the turn of the 20th century - the duelling fraternities and the ground-breaking scientists who laid the foundation of Germanys world-class transport technology

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo traces the early 20th-century roots of the Spanish Civil War, which divided his family and sent his father into exile. The former politician discovers a nation fractured at the time by social tensions and regional loyalties, which today offer a rich diversity of cultures to delight the tourist. After arriving in Majorca from Barcelona, Michael spoils himself enjoying spectacular scenic views aboard a 1912 vintage railway and a 1913 tram. He also gets trampled underfoot at the bottom of a Catalan people steeple and learns to make the perfect paella

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Sheldon and Peter search for the Ford Capri Mark 1 that is client Brians teenage dream, and attempt to bring its performance roaring back to life

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Sheldon and Peter take on an automatic Reliant Scimitar GTE for a fellow classic car enthusiast whos recovering from spinal surgery

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Sheldon and Peter are tasked with the ultimate challenge - a classic car thats reliable enough for everyday use. They take on the first ever European Car of the Year, a Rover P6

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: British car enthusiasts Will Trickett and Gus Gregory have just one week to fix neglected cars and double their selling price. Here, the duo head to London to buy a 73 Mk 4 Spitfire. It seems solid, but how it fares on the road remains to be seen

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Godber takes up boxing and enters the prison championships. He is hot favourite to win until Fletcher is given the task of fixing the contest and nobbling his cell-mate. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker, Richard Beckinsale and Peter Vaughan

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Harris accidentally drops stolen pills into Fletchers midday cuppa - much to the annoyance of prison racketeer Harry Grout, who resents a newcomer muscling in on his patch. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker. First broadcast in 1977

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher objects to having a third cellmate foisted on him, especially as the newcomer seems to enjoy special privileges and the full backing of the wardens. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Fulton Mackay

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the picturesque Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across Central America, from the Caribbean to the Pacific. Along the way, he goes diving on a coral reef on the coast of Belize, and witnesses a gun battle between park rangers and intruders in Chiquibul National Park. He also discovers how climate change has left Guatemala devastated by famine and drought, reports on measures to curb gang violence in El Salvador, and learns how Costa Rica aims to become the worlds first carbon neutral country by 2021

programme.title: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: The wildlife that inhabit the snow-covered forest and open tundra of the far north, including Arctic foxes that dig face first in the snow to hunt for lemmings and turtle hatchlings that stay frozen during winter, emerging from suspended animation in the first thaws of spring. Snowy owls take advantage of 24 hours of continuous daylight to hunt as much as possible. Plus, a look at how climate change is harming this environment by melting the permafrost deep within the soil

programme.title: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: The work of scientists studying climate change to discover how exactly the environment is changing and its impact for all life on Earth. Glaciologist Alun Hubbard investigates Greenlands melting glaciers from within, while astronaut Jessica Meir describes witnessing forest fires across Europe from the international space station, and reflects on how changing weather patterns are interconnected

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has to extract a vintage car from its bizarre resting place, while Charlie picks up a Vauxhall Viva from a man who has owned it for over half a century

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days, but Dereks still impressed

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Kevin Norris and Kieran Chisnall move three state-of-the-art trains, fresh in from Japan. They need to transport them from the North East port of Redcar to a factory in Doncaster

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: As Bobs wedding day dawns, a frustrated Terry continues to wreak havoc on people who happen to be unfortunate enough to live near him. Comedy, starring Rodney Bewes and James Bolam

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob and Thelma escape from Terrys influence as they begin their married life with a honeymoon in Norway, while Terry becomes acquainted with Thelmas sister Susan back at home

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Dutch DAF 66 - in vivid daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Pauls on a big day out collecting a 1971 Jaguar E-Type and a 1933 Morgan three-wheeler Supersport, but first theres a flock of 300 chickens to negotiate before he can load up

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves in fast car heaven as he picks up a rare Subaru Impreza and an equally powerful Ford Escort RS Cosworth from North Wales

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo takes in Georgia and Azerbaijan as he journeys through the former Russian empire. He begins in the port of Batumi, discovers a surprise 19th-century tea plantation in the West Georgian countryside, visits a private museum dedicated to Joseph Stalin - the most infamous Georgian of all - and discovers that a Briton was the first to conquer the highest mountain in the Caucasus range. Arriving in Azerbaijan, he learns about its role in the 19th-century oil industry

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with a 1936 edition of Bradshaws Continental Railway Guide, Michael Portillo ventures onto the European rail network, beginning an emotional rail journey which takes him deep into his familys past. In the golden city of Salamanca in northwestern Spain, Michael visits the University to hear of opposition to the fascist takeover of Spain by General Francisco Franco, and gains access to the Generals archive of enemies of the state. Travelling onto the capital city of Madrid, Michael hears how the bombing of a small town in the Basque region in 1937 inspired one of the 20th centurys most shocking works of art, before making his way to the town of Huesca. Michaels final stop is on the border with France at Canfranc station, where he learns of the role the old terminus played in the evacuation of Jews during the Second World War

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates an account of the liberation of Paris and Brussels in 1944, events which to many signified the end of the war. However, as the German forces retreated, Poland fell victim to one of the most tragic events of the war, Documentary chronicling the Second World War

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The story of the Nazi quest to establish an Aryan race, which set out to subjugate the Jewish population with decrees and laws about citizenship and escalated to the use of execution camps and the horrors of the Holocaust. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Chronicling the events that brought about the demise of the Third Reich, as the Allies arrived at the gates of Berlin and Hitler boarded himself up in his bunker, where it is believed he committed suicide. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How Japans early victories over Allied forces during the Second World War convinced its people that their strength and discipline would bring them victory. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents an exploration of Earths vast seas, which cover 70 per cent of the planets surface. In the first episode, millions of squid appear off the coast of California, gannets, whale sharks and dolphins hunt migrating sardines in the Indian Ocean, and thousands of turtles make the annual pilgrimage to lay their eggs in Costa Rica

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Camera crews journey to the deepest parts of the worlds oceans to explore the lives of their inhabitants, including fearsome predators with huge teeth, strange jellyfish and deep-sea sharks that lurk among the gigantic submerged mountains and volcanos. Presented by David Attenborough

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the picturesque Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has to extract a vintage car from its bizarre resting place, while Charlie picks up a Vauxhall Viva from a man who has owned it for over half a century

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming takes a tumble at Buckby Locks in Northamptonshire and has a problem with his power supply and battery bank

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A persistent door-to-door salesman makes grouchy Victor Meldrew see red - and an unending stream of junk mail through his letterbox threatens to push him over the brink into insanity. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret set off for a break by the seaside - but the discovery of a dead gull in their boarding-house bathroom sets the scene for what turns out to be a weekend of sheer hell. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star, with a guest appearance by Stephen Lewis of On the Buses fame

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor endures a sleepless night - and naturally ensures the eternally put-upon Margaret and their neighbours share in his suffering. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a documentary revealing how the forces of nature drive, shape and support the Earths great diversity of life. The first edition examines volcanoes, which responsible for both for the planets breathable atmosphere and the oceans, but are also the architects of the planet, with over 80% of the Earths surface being the result of magma bursting up from the molten interior - providing a platform for life

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Back from honeymoon, Bob and Thelma become increasingly worried about Terry, who seems to have gone off beer and mellowed into a strange state of middle-aged contemplativeness. Rodney Bewes and James Bolam star

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Mini Cooper and Chevy Pick Up
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business. Featured vehicles include a Mini Cooper and Chevrolet Pick-up truck
